name: Grilled Asparagus & Ginger-Lemon Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill over hot coals.
2. Lightly oil the asparagus spears and season with salt and pepper.
3. Grill the asparagus until it is crisp tender, turning occasionally for even cooking.
4. Serve warm or at room temperature.
5. Drizzle with Ginger Lemon Dressing.
6. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds.
